headline: Danaher Foundation Commits $1 Million to Ebola Outbreak Relief Efforts in Central Africa
summary: The Danaher Foundation, supported by Danaher Corporation (NYSE: DHR), today announced a $1 million commitment to support urgent, on-the-ground response to the Ebola Bundibugyo outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) and Uganda through Save the Children, the International Rescue Committee (IRC) and the World Food Program USA in support of the World Food Programme (WFP).

headline: Danaher: Why I'm Not Paying 24x P/E For 8% EPS Growth
summary: Danaher (DHR) is a high-quality life sciences holding company, but current valuation does not justify a buy.

headline: Danaher (DHR) Completes $9.9B Acquisition of Masimo Corporation
summary: Danaher Corporation (NYSE:DHR) is one of the best long term stocks to buy according to hedge funds. On June 10, Danaher completed its acquisition of Masimo Corporation, a specialist in pulse oximetry and patient monitoring solutions. Masimo will now function as a standalone operating company within Danaher’s Diagnostics segment, retaining its original brand identity while […]
